info.description: OpenAPI projection of the registry pillar's REST contract. Authored as a ts-rest contract (src/contract/rest.ts); consumed directly by polyglot clients and via openapi-typescript by TS consumers. Covers the domains migrated from tRPC so far and grows as each slice converts.
info.title: @pops/registry

get.summary: Resolved feature status for the current user (admin Features page)
List all registered feature manifests (sorted by order)
Runtime gate for a single feature in the current user context (404 on unknown key)

put.summary: Set the system-level enabled state (400 when the gate is failing)

delete.summary: Remove a per-user override (resolution falls back to the system default)

put.summary: Set a per-user override (400 when the feature is not user-scoped)

post.summary: Mint a service account and return its one-time plaintext key (admin only)
Revoke a service account by id (admin only)

get.summary: List effective values for every declared key (sensitive redacted)
Unified admin settings view fanned out over the live pillar registry

post.summary: Batch-read settings by key (missing omitted; sensitive redacted)
Reset declared keys to defaults (omit keys ⇒ reset all)
Transactional batch write (all-or-nothing); returns the written mirror

delete.summary: Reset a single setting to its default (legacy DELETE alias for the reset route)

get.summary: Read a single setting (null on unset; sensitive redacted)

post.summary: Internal-only write-once seed (encryption seed / client id)
Reset a single setting to its manifest default

get.summary: Read the boot-time install manifest (installed apps + overlays)
Resolve a user URI (pops://core/user/<email>) for cross-pillar reconciliation
